summary_counts.hard_blocker_or_already_known_excluded: saved 9, applied 9, archived 10, recommended ~5 hard-stops, + dedup against 115-record master_submissions + round-1/round-2 discovery

honesty_note: LinkedIn is now LIGHTLY tapped, not saturated. Saved/Applied/Archived are fully consumed (only RxBenefits new). Recommended is recycling known hard-stops. The targeted authed searches DID surface a genuine fresh batch (Navitus, Autodesk-Portland, RxBenefits, LEAP, Gainsight, Chainalysis + the sidebar rail). But note: of the 9 new, only ~4 are clean fits; the rest carry a real YOE stretch (Gainsight 6-10yr PM, Autodesk 8yr, Chainalysis 6yr) or eligibility caveat (Tenstorrent contract, Exact Sciences onsite-WI). Most P1 hits are sponsor-SILENT remote roles at firms with unverified non-tech H1B patterns — each needs an h1bdata SOC check before build. This is incremental yield, not a fresh goldmine.
